scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev:server" "npm run dev:web" "npm run dev:admin"
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace=server && npm run build --workspace=apps/web && npm run build --workspace=apps/admin
scripts.start: concurrently "npm run start --workspace=server" "npm run start --workspace=apps/web" "npm run start --workspace=apps/admin"
